emails.subject: CRITICAL - Production database is down
emails.body: The main production database has been unresponsive for 10 minutes. All customer orders are failing. Immediate action required.

emails.subject: See who viewed your profile this week
emails.body: You had 14 profile views this week. Upgrade to Premium to see who.

emails.subject: Team lunch Friday?
emails.body: Hey! Thinking of organizing a team lunch this Friday at 1pm. Let me know if you can make it. No pressure!

emails.subject: Q4 sales report attached
emails.body: Please find the Q4 sales report attached for your review. No immediate action needed.

emails.subject: Customer complaint - Order #4821
emails.body: A customer is reporting that order #4821 has not arrived after 2 weeks. They are requesting an urgent update.

email_001.response_hint: Escalating to on-call engineering team immediately.

email_005.response_hint: Investigating order #4821 and will update customer within 2 hours.
